query:
-- Migrate registered users from users table to players table
INSERT INTO players (userId, name, email, type, isPremium, createdAt, updatedAt, lastActivityAt)
SELECT 
  u.id,
  COALESCE(u.name, CONCAT('User-', u.id)),
  u.email,
  'registered',
  u.isPremium,
  u.createdAt,
  u.updatedAt,
  COALESCE(u.lastSignedIn, NOW())
FROM users u
WHERE u.id NOT IN (SELECT userId FROM players WHERE userId IS NOT NULL);

-- Update players table with activity stats from cycle_history
UPDATE players p
SET 
  totalPuzzles = (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ch.totalPuzzles), 0)
    FROM cycle_history ch
    WHERE ch.userId = p.userId AND p.userId IS NOT NULL
  ),
  totalCorrect = (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ch.correctCount), 0)
    FROM cycle_history ch
    WHERE ch.userId = p.userId AND p.userId IS NOT NULL
  ),
  totalTimeMs = (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ch.totalTimeMs), 0)
    FROM cycle_history ch
    WHERE ch.userId = p.userId AND p.userId IS NOT NULL
  ),
  completedCycles = (
    SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0)
    FROM cycle_history ch
    WHERE ch.userId = p.userId AND p.userId IS NOT NULL
  ),
  accuracy = (
    SELECT ROUND(
      COALESCE(SUM(ch.correctCount), 0) / 
      NULLIF(COALESCE(SUM(ch.totalPuzzles), 0), 0) * 100, 2
    )
    FROM cycle_history ch
    WHERE ch.userId = p.userId AND p.userId IS NOT NULL
  ),
  lastActivityAt = COALESCE(
    (SELECT MAX(ch.completedAt)
     FROM cycle_history ch
     WHERE ch.userId = p.userId AND p.userId IS NOT NULL),
    NOW()
  )
WHERE p.userId IS NOT NULL;
